name: Incoming Machine!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>迫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>りくる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>機械</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マシーン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Add 1 monster that mentions "Max Metalmorph" or 1 "Metalmorph" Trap from your Deck or GY to your hand. If you control a "Metalmorph" Trap: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Defense Position monster your opponent controls; change it to face-up Attack Position. You can only use this effect of "Incoming Machine!" once per turn.
eff: Add 1 monster that mentions "Max Metalmorph" or 1 "Metalmorph" Trap from your Deck or GY to your hand. If you control a "Metalmorph" Trap: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Defense Position monster your opponent controls; change it to face-up Attack Position. You can only use this effect of "Incoming Machine!" once per turn.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
